narrative_text: ESTABLISHED IN 1979 AS A VOLUNTEER CHARITY WITH THE MOTTO "WHAT YOU GIVE IS WHAT THEY GET", CFI WAS DESIGNED TO ENABLE 100% OF DONATIONS TO REACH CHARITIES IN ISRAEL. OVER THE YEARS, WE RECEIVED THE JERUSALEM PRIZE FOR VOLUNTEERISM, ACCOLADES FROM THE CHIEF RABBINATE, AN AWARD FROM PM MENACHEM BEGIN AND ACCOLADES FROM HUNDREDS OF CHARITIES IN ISRAEL. WE DO NOT SOLICIT OR ADVERTISE. BY WORD OF MOUTH ALONE WE HAVE GROWN INTO A SIGNIFICANT CHARITABLE FORCE IN IERAEL, WHICH HELPS THE NATION OF ISRAEL TO THRIVE.

COMMUNITY PROJECTS: THE ORGANIZATION UNDERTAKES COMMUNITY PROJECTS WHICH BENEFIT THE WELFARE OF THE CITIZENS AND THE LAND OF ISRAEL. THE WORLD AROUND US CONTINUES TO RAPIDLY CHANGE AND THE THREATS TO THE NATION OF ISRAEL, THE LAND OF ISRAEL, THE PEOPLE OF ISRAEL, AND THE SUPPORTERS OF ISRAEL ALL AROUND THE WORLD CONTINUES TO RISE EXPONENTIALLY. AS REPORTED BY ALL WATCHDOG GROUPS AROUND THE WORLD, ANTI-SEMITISM IS A GROWING INDUSTRY IN ITS CLASSIC FORM AND IN THE PRESENT DAY FORM. VOICES OF DEMONSTRATIONS, BOYCOTTS AND ANTI-SEMITISM ARE HEARD NOT ONLY IN THE GUTTERS BUT IN CLASSROOMS, UNIVERSITY CAMPUSES, NEWSPAPERS AND PARLIAMENTS ALL OVER THE WORLD. AS THE ENEMIES OF THE JEWISH NATION HAVE BECOME AWARE OF THE FUTILITY TO DESTROY US PHYSICALLY, THEY HAVE FOUND NEW WAYS TO CAUSE US HARM. THE VENOM HEARD THROUGHOUT IS REMINISCENT OF THE 1930'S AND ITS DISASTROUS CONSEQUENCES TO HUMANITY. THIS YEAR AGAIN, CFI HAS SIGNIFICANTLY INCREASED DONATIONS TO COMBAT ANTI-SEMITISM AND THE BDS MOVEMENT. OUR COMMUNITY PROJECTS ARE MEANT TO INCREASE PUBLIC AWARENESS TO THE REALITIES OF ANTI-SEMITISM AND COMBAT IT WHEREVER IT IS FOUND. WHETHER THROUGH USE OF THE LEGAL SYSTEM OR SOCIAL MEDIA, WE NEED TO EDUCATE THE WORLD OF THE EVIL EFFECTS OF ANTI-SEMITISM, AS NOT EVEN 100 YEARS REMOVED FROM THE HOLOCAUST, WE SEE HISTORY REPEATING ITSELF. OUR GRANTS ALSO GO TO ASSIST IN THE CONSTRUCTION AND MAINTENANCE OF COMMUNITY FACILITIES THROUGHOUT ISRAEL.

CATEGORY #4 - SUPPORT OF RELIGIOUS INSTITUTIONS: PROVIDED GRANTS THAT ARE PRIMARILY FOR THE SUPPORT, MAINTANANCE, AND THE CONSTRUCTION OF SYNAGOGUES AND OTHER RELIGIOUS INSTITUTIONS AND RELIGIOUS PROGRAMS. TOTAL EXPENSES - $2,383,640 TOTAL GRANTS - $2,383,640 GATEGORY #5 - MEDICAL SERVICES: PROVIDED SUPPORT FOR CLINICS AND HOSPITALS IN ORDER TO PROVIDE AID TO THE NEEDY THAT SUFFER WITH MANY MEDICAL ISSUES. IN ADDITION, SUPPORT IS PROVIDED FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF MEDICAL FACILITIES. TOTAL EXPENSES - $780,388 TOTAL GRANTS - $780,388 CATEGORY #6 - SECURITY PROGRAMS: ISRAEL WITNESSED HUNDREDS OF ACTS OF TERRORISTS IN 2018. ISRAEL SECURITY PRECAUTIONS ARE GETTING BETTER ALL THE TIME AND CFI IS PROUD TO BE A SMALL PART OF THAT ADVANCE. TOTAL EXPENSES - $409,010 TOTAL GRANTS - $409,010
